docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-27-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-27-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---KARLA PADILLA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-27-2014 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - SERVED FEB-25-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GOMEZ, ELPIDIO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,400.00 FILED BY ALEVES-GONZALEZ, ROSAURA AS TO DEFENDANT GOMEZ, ELPIDIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-27-2014 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALEVES-GONZALEZ, ROSAURA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOMEZ, ELPIDIO $2,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,875.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
